channel.title: Go Humble! RSS GAMES
channel.description: Awesome RSS Feeds about HumbleBundle games bundles!

item.title: The MIX Spring Showcase: Games Around The World
item.content:encoded:
The thick of winter is melting off, and the coolest games around are flowin’ downstream. Help support charity and unlock The Spring Mix Showcase; Filming viral videos with your friends goes very wrong when the supernatural are involved—have a spooktacular time with the co-op adventure Content Warning. Battle your exes, disappoint your parents, and cook up some revenge in the anti-dating sim, Thirsty Suitors. Your favorite bros are back with burn-based moves and a new mission in Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Tactical Takedown.

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before March 30th, 2027.

item.title: The ESA All-Star Alliance Bundle
item.content:encoded:
What better way to celebrate a good cause than by getting your hands on some great games? Dive into some recent favorites and support one of gaming’s biggest nights with this tie-in bundle for the ESA Foundation’s Nite to Unite! Sink your saber teeth into the prehistoric action of Far Cry Primal! Defeat the conniving villains and reclaim the throne of Dishonored 2! Solve a series of old-timey murder mysteries in Pentiment! Become the ultimate organized crime kingpin in the Mafia Trilogy! Scavenge to survive the post-Apocalyptic zombie horde of State of Decay 2! Every purchase of this bundle at the price of your choosing benefits the Entertainment Software Association!

Keys expire. Please redeem Harry Potter: Quidditch Champions before September 27th, 2026. All other titles should be redeemed before March 27th, 2027.

item.title: Games Done Quick- Frost Fatales 2026
item.content:encoded:
Games Done Quick’s annual celebration of gaming and giving is back with Frost Fatales 2026, and we’re here to offer you a piece of the fun! Cut through Q-UP, the speedrunable line game that’s one part clicker, one part multiplayer strategy, one part demented capitalism simulator, and 100% addicting. Cozy up to Here Comes Niko!, the cutest little platformer with a massive heart. Or collect the blood of the gods to grow your power in Voidwrought, the hand-drawn action-platformer. Try your hand at a speedrun through one of these amazing games and help support the National Women’s Law Center with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem Yars Rising before September 27th, 2026. All other titles should be redeemed before March 27th, 2027

item.title: Best of Boomer Shooters 5: Penta Boom
item.content:encoded:
Say hello to the Penta BOOM Bundle! Boomers offer players the fastest, most brutal gameplay of the genre. Unlock bold visuals and even bolder gunplay with the inventive, upgrade-driven adventure Sulfur. Experience the unparalleled adrenaline rush of Metal Eden, a sci-fi FPS with breathtaking gameplay. Clear out a secluded mansion filled to the brim with demonic fiends one room at a time in Killing Time: Resurrected. Play these great boomer shooters and help support Oceana with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem Killing Time Resurrected before September 25th, 2026. All other titles should be redeemed before March 25th, 2027.

item.title: Mega Man: Charged Up Collection
item.content:encoded:
Mega Man mega fans and newbies alike won’t want to miss this bundle of Mega Man’s greatest hits! And, most excitingly, there are some new faces here along with a few familiar favorites: this bundle’s higher tiers feature games that have appeared in our bundles, but the $20 tier includes games that have never been bundled before! Power up your characters and weapons in entirely new combinations and test them against the side-scrolling action of Mega Man X DiVE Offline! Replay some old favorites or try them out for the first time with both volumes of the Mega Man Battle Network Legacy Collection! Get up to date with the main series and stop Dr. Wily’s nefarious plans in Mega Man 11! There’s much more Mega Man to be found in this bundle, so grab it while your Mega Busters are hot and support Children’s Miracle Network Hospitals with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before March 19th, 2027

item.title: Cartridge Chaos
item.description: These homages will blow you away
item.content:encoded:
We’re throwing it back to the good old days of bits, pixels, and platformers with this bundle of indie games with a retro feel! Save Sequin Land from total takeover by an evil foe in Shantae and the Pirate’s Curse! Take vengeance on your creators and discover hidden secrets in Vengeful Guardian: Moonrider! Go back in time for real to remix the past and help the Power Rangers fend off their archnemesis in Mighty Morphin’ Power Rangers: Rita’s Rewind! All of the great games in this bundle bring an old-fashioned aesthetic into the modern era. Grab it now while you can, and support NPower with your purchase!!

Keys expire. Please redeem all titles by March 18, 2027. The only exception is Moonrider, whose keys will expire on September 18, 2026.

item.title: Focus Entertainment Bundle 2026
item.content:encoded: Explore the epic variety of Focus Entertainment with our latest high-octane game bundle! Every step forward comes equipped with two steps backwards in the dark, brutal, and breathtaking world of the award-winning A Plague Tale: Requiem and A Plague Tale: Innocence. Play as lightning-powered cowboys fighting monsters in Evil West. Defeat legendary monsters in spectacular fashion in Atlas Fallen: Reign of Sand. Pay what you want and help support the charity of your choice with Humble Bundle!

item.title: Humble 15 Time Capsule
item.content:encoded:
It’s our birthday, and everyone’s invited! We’re kicking off our 15th Anniversary of Humble Bundle with this collection of our favorite roguelikes and adventure games. Discover 5 fresh, never-before-bundled indie titles, paired with favorites from our very first bundles. Uncover the mysteries of a fantastical fantasy world alongside your own charming creations in the intricate strategy game Oddsparks: An Automation Adventure! Master the magic of the written word and save the Atheneum from evil in Inkbound! Take charge of an eldritch arena and wield powerful weapons against demonic foes in Kill Knight! Explore a haunted island, lift a curse, and find your missing pirate crew in Mark of the Deep! Celebrate 15 years of Humble along with one of our first charity partners: Child’s Play Charity!

Keys expire. Please redeem Bionic Bay before September 11th, 2026. All other titles should be redeemed before March 11th, 2027

item.title: Beamdog & Owlcat: RPG Masters
item.description: Killer RPGs from the modern masters
item.content:encoded:
CRPG fans, this is the one you’ve been waiting for! Owlcat and Beamdog are responsible for some of the finest RPGs of the last decade—now’s your chance to snag both their entire catalogs in a single epic bundle! Explore the grimdark future like never before in Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader. Shake the very foundations of Golarion in Pathfinder: Wrath of the Righteous. Get all these games and more—including classics like Baldur’s Gate: Enhanced Edition, Neverwinter Nights: Complete Adventures, and many more. Plus, your purchase helps support DonorsChoose!

Keys expire. Please redeem Pathfinder: Kingmaker - Season Pass and Pathfinder: Kingmaker - Enhanced Plus Edition before September 11th, 2026. All other titles should be redeemed before March 11th, 2027

item.title: Call of the Wild 9th Anniversary
item.description: The most realistic hunting sim roaming these lands
item.content:encoded:
Jump into the dynamic and realistic world of theHunter: Call of the Wild and experience a new level of hunting realism. This value-packed game bundle features a massive collection of add-ons and DLC. Hunt the rich Emerald Coast of Australia, the snowy peaks of the New England Mountains, and more. Take on alligators, lions, and other voracious predators and sell their pelts for supplies and coins. Pay what you want for the ultimate theHunter: Call of the Wild experience, and help support One Tree Planted with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem all titles before March 6th, 2027.

item.title: Love You to Death Bundle
item.description: Our bloody Valentine's day gift to you
item.content:encoded:
February is the month of connection and romance, and there’s no better way to celebrate than with the horror games from our all-new Love You to Death Bundle! Try Ghost Watchers—the goosebump-inducing co-op ghost-hunting journey, Have a Nice Death—the adorably addicting action roguelike starring everyone’s favorite scythe-wielding bearer of death, Iron Lung—the claustrophobic journey through the bottom of a blood-filled alien ocean, and so much more. Find out what makes you scream and help support Coral Guardian with your purchase.

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before March 4th, 2027.
